approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 treats hedges of recognised assets or liabilities as a distinct hedge-accounting model, which is relevant where a dividend gives rise to a recognised receivable.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 treats hedges of forecast transactions as a separate hedge-accounting model, and the context specifically addresses highly probable forecast intragroup foreign currency transactions in consolidation.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9, IAS 21 and IFRIC 16 identify hedges of foreign currency risk in a net investment in a foreign operation as a distinct top-level hedge-accounting model in consolidated financial statements.
